data.title: LS Cable & System invests $156M in Mexico to boost production capacity, transform LSCMX as key manufacturing hub.
data.description: In Querétaro, Mexico, LS Cable & System Ltd. disclosed a strategic investment of around $156 million in its manufacturing subsidiary, LS Cable & System, S.A. de C.V. The investment aims to boost production capacity and enhance the company's integrated manufacturing and supply chain network in North America. This significant investment will lead to the transformation of LSCMX.

data.title: Eason Technology Limited receives warning letter from NYSE American for non-compliance with Section 401(a) of NYSE rules.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, Eason Technology Limited disclosed receiving a warning letter from NYSE American LLC due to non-compliance with Section 401(a) of the NYSE. The company, listed as DXF on NYSE American, is facing issues related to this violation.

data.title: Investigation underway regarding sale of Exact Sciences Corporation to Abbott Laboratories - EXAS to ABT.
data.description: An inquiry is being conducted by Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq., former Attorney General of Louisiana, and law firm Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC, regarding the potential acquisition of Exact Sciences Corporation (NasdaqCM: EXAS) by Abbott Laboratories (NYSE: ABT). The investigation pertains to the sale proposal between the two companies.

data.title: Scholarship offering $1,500 for undergrad students committed to healthcare innovation by Dr. Sajad Zalzala.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, in Detroit, the Dr. Sajad Zalzala Scholarship for Healthcare Professionals unveiled a new $1,500 scholarship aimed at aiding undergraduate students dedicated to revolutionizing healthcare through preventive medicine and addressing core issues. The scholarship seeks to empower students pursuing careers in healthcare with a focus on preventative measures and long-term solutions.

data.title: Thomas Mollick launches $1,000 scholarship for undergraduate entrepreneurs nationwide to foster innovation and leadership.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on January 16, 2026, the Thomas Mollick Scholarship for Entrepreneurs has launched its first award cycle. This scholarship is open to undergraduate students across the country and offers a $1,000 grant aimed at promoting innovation, leadership, and entrepreneurial skills. The scholarship was created by Thomas Mollick.

data.title: AANP President Dr. Valerie Fuller attends White House event on Rural Health Transformation Program, emphasizing rural health care access.
data.description: In attendance at a White House event on Jan. 16, 2026, Dr. Valerie Fuller, President of the American Association of Nurse Practitioners® (AANP), emphasized the significance of the Rural Health Transformation Program (RHTP) in providing essential healthcare services to rural areas. The event highlighted the necessity of ensuring access to quality healthcare for rural communities.

data.title: U.S. District Court allows Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind project to resume work after granting preliminary injunction.
data.description: Dominion Energy has been granted a preliminary injunction by the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Virginia to resume construction on the Coastal Virginia Offshore Wind (CVOW) project. This decision will allow the company to restart work on the project, with the goal of delivering essential energy in a matter of weeks. The lawsuit challenging the agency's actions will continue to progress as construction on the project moves forward. Dominion Energy remains committed to seeking a resolution, with an emphasis on the prompt delivery of critical energy.

data.title: Dow Jones near record highs, Nvidia stock up, obesity drug company soars. Live coverage by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index surged close to all-time highs, showing promising growth. Nvidia stock also saw a significant rebound, reaching a crucial level on Thursday. In the stock market today, the Dow and S&P experienced fluctuations while a struggling obesity drug company witnessed a substantial surge. This development was detailed in live coverage by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: AbbVie reports successful Phase 3 trial for Epcoritamab in DLBCL, plans to engage authorities for next steps.
data.description: AbbVie, in collaboration with Genmab, is set to discuss the future steps with global regulatory authorities following the release of the top-line findings from the EPCORE® DLBCL-1 trial. The Phase 3 trial results were unveiled by AbbVie on January 16, 2026, in North Chicago, Illinois. AbbVie, listed on the NYSE as ABBV, is moving forward with their partners to engage in talks with regulatory bodies worldwide after this significant development.

data.title: AiN Group celebrates 25 years with 2026 Live & Learn conference in Baha Mar, expect 700+ leaders, 70+ brands in Nassau.
data.description: Over 700 leaders in security, AV, and smart home integration, along with 70 partner brands, will convene in Nassau from January 21 to 24 for educational sessions, networking, and Passport to Profit meetings. The gathering is organized by AiN Group (Authorized Integrators Network) and is set to take place in Detroit on January 16, 2026.

data.title: Federal Signal (NYSE: FSS) completes acquisition of Mega Corp, a leading specialty vehicles manufacturer.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, in Downers Grove, Illinois, Federal Signal Corporation (NYSE: FSS), a prominent provider of environmental and safety solutions, revealed the successful finalization of the purchase of Mega Corp., a key player in specialized vehicle manufacturing. This acquisition marks a significant development for Federal Signal as it expands its presence in the industry.

data.title: Instinct Science acquires ScribbleVet to enhance veterinary software with AI, workflow, and clinical intelligence.
data.description: Instinct Science has revolutionized PIMS by incorporating AI, workflow automation, and clinical intelligence into a unified system tailored for the evolution of veterinary care. Based in Philadelphia, the innovative development was announced on January 16, 2026. Instinct Science is renowned for its pioneering veterinary practice management system, Instinct EMR, which is poised to set new standards in the industry.

data.title: Goldman Sachs' investment banking to grow by 15% in 2026 as it reports mixed Q4 results in fiscal 2025 with $13.45 billion in net revenue (-3% Y/Y), and earnings at $14.01 per share. Bank of America Securities analyst raised price forecast to $1,100.
data.description: In the latest fiscal quarter of 2025, Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. (NYSE: GS) experienced a mixed performance as it closed the year, primarily impacted by substantial markdowns and exit expenses related to its consumer platform. The bank's fourth-quarter financial results were reported as a mix, characterized by losses in Platform Solutions totaling $2.26 billion. These losses were attributed to the movement of Apple Card loans to a held-for-sale status, along with costs associated with terminating contracts. Despite this, the net revenue for the quarter saw a 3% decline year over year, amounting to $13.45 billion, falling short of the expected $13.79 billion. On a more positive note, GAAP earnings reached $14.01 per share for the quarter, showing an increase from $11.95 per share reported a year earlier and surpassing the consensus estimate of $11.65. Following the results, Bank of America Securities analyst Ebrahim H. Poonawala revised the price target for Goldman Sachs upwards to $1,100 from $1,050.

data.title: Bailey Equipment & Intralogistics acquires Equipment Depot's Washington operations, bringing 75 years of expertise to the state.
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee on January 16, 2026, Bailey Equipment & Intralogistics, a reputable forklift dealership with over 75 years of experience, has recently acquired Equipment Depot's operational business in Washington state. This acquisition is a significant strategic decision for Bailey Equipment & Intralogistics, a third-generation, family-owned company.
